summary: Testing completed for Biblical Dictionary multilingual feature. Backend: 28/28 tests passed. Frontend: Dictionary page loads correctly, terms sorted alphabetically, language switching works, term detail view shows all fields including AI ask section.
critical_code_review_comments: Dictionary implementation is solid with 69 terms covering Hebrew, Greek, and Aramaic origins
AI translation on-demand works correctly with MongoDB caching for performance
Origin labels correctly translated for all 6 languages (it, en, es, de, fr, pt)
Terms sorted alphabetically by term name (ignoring parentheses content)
Pre-translated meanings available for common terms (agape, shalom, logos, etc.)
Quiz submit endpoint expects Dict[str, int] format for answers, not list
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Biblical Dictionary feature fully tested and working:
1. GET /api/dictionary?lang={lang} returns 69 terms sorted alphabetically
2. GET /api/dictionary/{term_id}?lang={lang} returns full term with AI translation
3. Origin labels (Hebrew, Greek, Aramaic) correctly translated per language
4. AI translation on-demand works with MongoDB caching
5. Quiz submit works with Dict[str, int] format for answers
6. Frontend dictionary page shows terms, search, and detail view
7. Language switching updates all UI labels and term translations

dictionary_list_tests.69_terms_all_languages: PASS - All 6 languages return exactly 69 terms

ai_translation_tests.caching: PASS - Second request uses cached translation

ai_study_test.ai_dictionary_study: PASS - Returns AI answer for term question

frontend_verification.term_detail_view: PASS - Shows all fields including verses and AI section
frontend_verification.language_switching: PASS - Labels and meanings update per language
